name: Rand Paul
subject: Final showdown in five days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Five days.

That's how long you and I have until the U.S. Senate meets in a rare Sunday session on May 31st where surveillance state apologists will do everything they can to RAM through an extension of the so-called "PATRIOT Act's" ILLEGAL and unconstitutional domestic spying programs.

Fellow Conservative, this is the best chance you and I have ever had to strike a massive blow against the growing American spy state!

I'm not backing down. I'm not going to compromise. I'm going to stand and fight until the very last moment -- regardless of the smears and attacks I face.

But I'm afraid victory won't happen without you.

That's why my campaign is launching an emergency "Swamp the Senate Money Bomb" starting right now.

My campaign has until May 31st to rally Americans fed up with illegal domestic spying to turn up the heat on my colleagues.

**[So please sign your petition right away, and then forward this email to everyone you know](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28005852:26903643079:m:1:879035888:22899734DA2CACB4B8E9C53B674F849E:r)**.

Once you've signed, I hope you'll **[please chip in $10](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28005853:26903643079:m:1:879035888:22899734DA2CACB4B8E9C53B674F849E:r)** to help my campaign gather one million signatures by Sunday.

The truth is, I believe this fight cuts to the very core of American freedom.

The Founders understood that privacy and Liberty are inseparable.

Once government knows exactly how we live, it won't be long until they try to run our lives.

That's why they included the Fourth Amendment in the Bill of Rights -- to protect our individual privacy against government intrusion.

Today, the Fourth Amendment is under attack like never before by those who believe the only way we can remain safe and secure from terrorism is under the watchful eye of Big Brother.

Meanwhile, they ignore the fact that the FBI recently admitted the NSA's bulk collection of Americans' data has helped them crack exactly ZERO terrorist plots!

I believe the Bill of Rights is non-negotiable.

I believe we could have both Liberty and security -- if our government would spend more time using the legal tools they have to combat terrorism instead of snooping on millions of law-abiding American citizens.

And I worry what could happen to our country if you and I don't stand and fight.

What's to become of us if we decide freedom no longer works?

What's to become of us if we continue to hand over our freedoms to a government that's proven it will abuse its power?

Fellow Conservative, there are far more snakes than saints in Washington, D.C.

Our government will abuse its power to crack down on political enemies -- just like we've seen from both the IRS and the Obama Justice Department.

Most conservatives understand that allowing the government to register our guns will ultimately lead to gun confiscation.

The NSA's spying programs can uncover virtually every aspect of our lives.

That's why I'm going to fight with everything I have.

But I must be able to count on you to help me Swamp the Senate.

Please **[chip in $10](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28005853:26903643079:m:1:879035888:22899734DA2CACB4B8E9C53B674F849E:r)** \-- and then forward this email to everyone you know.

When the Senate comes back into session on May 31st, there will be just eight hours for spy state apologists to reach a deal to keep these programs going.

Eight hours!

If you and I can hold the surveillance state apologists off for only 8 hours on May 31, we'll relegate the NSA's illegal spy program to the trash bin of history where it belongs.

**[So please sign your petition and chip in immediately](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28005852:26903643079:m:1:879035888:22899734DA2CACB4B8E9C53B674F849E:r)**.

It's not clear which path NSA apologists will choose to take next. _All that's clear is that, against all odds - you and I have won "Round 1_."

When the bell rings in "Round 2" on May 31st, I'm going to slug it out with everything I've got for 8 hours.

I really need you in my corner.

**[Please continue to stand with me](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28005852:26903643079:m:1:879035888:22899734DA2CACB4B8E9C53B674F849E:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28005854:26903643079:m:1:879035888:22899734DA2CACB4B8E9C53B674F849E:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28005855:26903643079:m:1:879035888:22899734DA2CACB4B8E9C53B674F849E:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28005856:26903643079:m:1:879035888:22899734DA2CACB4B8E9C53B674F849E:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28005857:26903643079:m:1:879035888:22899734DA2CACB4B8E9C53B674F849E:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28005853:26903643079:m:1:879035888:22899734DA2CACB4B8E9C53B674F849E:r)
In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28005858:26903643079:m:1:879035888:22899734DA2CACB4B8E9C53B674F849E:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28005859:26903643079:m:1:879035888:22899734DA2CACB4B8E9C53B674F849E:r)[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28005860:26903643079:m:1:879035888:22899734DA2CACB4B8E9C53B674F849E:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWW6aXD1BN). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWW6aXD1BN)

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Me and my dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend,

I keep a pretty close eye on my email account, and recently quite a few of you have reached out asking for a signed photo or bumper sticker. But, I thought I would do one better... so I gave dad a call to see if he would be willing to sign a few photos with me.

**He insisted on an action shot, but was all in.**

So today we're officially launching a contest where 3 lucky winners will win the photo below of my dad and I battling it out on the tennis court, signed by both of us. [**All you have to do to enter is chip in $3 right now.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3637:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

This contest won't last long, so enter now while you still can.

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3638:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[**Remember, just chip in $3 right now for your chance to win one of three framed, autographed photos of my dad and me.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3639:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

An opportunity like this doesn't come around every day, don't miss out, Friend: **[RighttoRisePAC.org/Signed-Photo/](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3640:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Thank you and good luck!

Jeb

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3641:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=460&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://righttorisepac.org/signed-photo-rules/). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://righttorisepac.org/win-a-signed-photo/). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://righttorisepac.org/signed-photo/). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](https://righttorisepac.org/win-a-signed-photo/). Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Tuesday, May 26, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Friday, June 5, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on Friday, June 5, 2015. Three winners will receive the following Prize: one (1) framed, autographed photo of Jeb Bush and President George H.W. Bush with an approximate value of $100 each. Approximate total retail value is $300. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $300. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules]( https://righttorisepac.org/signed-photo-rules/). The Sponsor is the Right to Rise PAC. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317.

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Rand against the Machine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The Washington establishment has singled out Rand Paul as someone they must defeat if they're going to continue their assault on the Bill of Rights.

So they're looking for every opportunity they can find to smear Rand Paul and silence his message. And they're turning to Big Government senators to do their dirty work.

Rand needs your help to fight back before the May 31st deadline.

**[Will you Stand with Rand® by adding your name to the fight to end illegal NSA spying](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28014023:26910718429:m:1:879035888:4046DB979D7A7E942F2E234E610F65D4:r)**?

Please don't delay. Rand is constantly being attacked for his efforts last week.

Just moments after Rand successfully blocked reauthorization of the so-called "PATRIOT" Act on Saturday, the senior Senator from Arizona dared to attack Rand and his supporters, stating his strong stand for the Fourth Amendment was only a campaign stunt.

Fellow Conservative, I know freedom is often viewed as a dirty word in Washington, D.C.

_But Senator Paul has a long and distinguished record of standing up to the surveillance state_.

And much to the Big Government establishment's chagrin, the American people stand strongly behind Rand Paul!

That's what the senior Senator from Arizona's attacks were really about.

As one of the longest-serving members of the Washington Machine, he understands the movement Rand Paul is leading is the biggest threat to their grip on power in decades.

When the Senate comes back into session on May 31st, there will be just eight hours for spy state apologists to reach a deal to keep these programs going.

Rand is determined to do whatever he can to stop them - regardless of the ugly smears launched by both the press and surveillance state backers.

But he needs your help to "Swamp the Senate" on May 31st.

**[Please sign your petition and forward this email to your friends and family](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28014023:26910718429:m:1:879035888:4046DB979D7A7E942F2E234E610F65D4:r)**.

And after you sign, I hope Rand can count on you to **[please chip in at least $10](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28014023:26910718429:m:1:879035888:4046DB979D7A7E942F2E234E610F65D4:r)** or more immediately.

Rand only has until May 31st to rally Americans fed up with illegal domestic spying to turn up the heat on the Senate.

**[So please Stand with Rand® right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28014023:26910718429:m:1:879035888:4046DB979D7A7E942F2E234E610F65D4:r)**.

In Liberty,

Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28014024:26910718429:m:1:879035888:4046DB979D7A7E942F2E234E610F65D4:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28014025:26910718429:m:1:879035888:4046DB979D7A7E942F2E234E610F65D4:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28014026:26910718429:m:1:879035888:4046DB979D7A7E942F2E234E610F65D4:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWB_6ji1NV). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWB_6ji1NV)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: People should not underestimate us
body:
#
Friend,
In just a few hours, I intend to join thousands of friends and neighbors in Burlington, Vermont to formally launch our presidential campaign.
Income and wealth inequality have reached obscene levels, the threat of climate change is more frightening than ever, and the billionaire class is now allowed to spend unlimited amounts of money to buy the candidates they want.
Our country is in serious trouble, and it is up to us to stand up and fight back -- to launch the most heroic of all struggles: **a political revolution**.
[**Add your $5 contribution to our campaign, because it will take all of us coming together to breathe new life into the soul of our nation.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2104/43f17890/5e0e0db6/621dee1f/2039756193/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/political-revolution?refcode=em150526a-1f")
The billionaires of America are on the warpath, buying candidates and elections to quench their insatiable appetite for more and more. Meanwhile, while the rich get richer, millions of us work longer hours for lower wages and children go hungry.
The truth is that if we stand together, there is no limit to what we can accomplish. We can bring hope to the political process. We can make real change.
People should not underestimate us. Let's rock the boat.
\- Bernie** **

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2104/43f17890/5e0e0db6/621dee1f/2039756193/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/political-revolution?refcode=em150526a-1f")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
(not the billionaires)
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2104/43f17890/5e0e0db6/621dee1c/2039756193/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2104/43f17890/5e0e0db6/621dee1d/2039756193/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

subject: Have you responded?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI3MTQ0NzMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyNTY4OTM0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
_**

Peter - can you help us out?

Our American Revival is committed to restoring power to the people and their states by cutting the size and scope of the federal government - and we need your input to help guide our work.

[**Will you please take a moment to let us know how you think we can get America back on track?**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI3MTQ0NzMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyNTY4OTM0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Your input will help us start the important work of promoting new ideas to get our nation back on track.
Thanks again!
Lauren
Our American Revival

name: Hillary for America
subject: Be the first to get your official Hillary 2016 gear

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I can promise you this, friends
body:
#
Friend,
I'm about an hour from stepping out onto a stage in front of thousands of people who came out to Waterfront Park in Burlington, Vermont to kick off my campaign for president.
Today, as I've walked around my hometown, I've seen families with young children as well as many seniors; folks who drove three or four hours and more to get here. **They have come together united around a single purpose: starting a political revolution to take back our country from powerful special interests.**
I will tell them shortly what I'll tell you now: This is our country, and it's time we took it back from the billionaire class. Today, we come together to say, "Enough is enough."
[**I'm asking you to add your $5 contribution to our campaign now to help us start this political revolution. Click here to make your contribution.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2171/43f17890/5e73a995/621dead3/4243135079/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/political-revolution?refcode=em150526pm1-b")
The Agenda for America I'm laying out this afternoon is a bold plan that can and will rebuild our country. Here are some of the components of that agenda:
* Address income and wealth inequality by demanding that the wealthy and large corporations start paying their fair share of taxes
* Make quality health care a right for all Americans
* Raise the minimum wage to a living wage and make sure women are paid as much as men
* Make higher education affordable by ending tuition at all public colleges and universities and by substantially lowering interest rates on student debt
* Expand and protect Social Security and Medicare
* Have America lead the world in addressing the planetary crisis of climate change
* Take on Wall Street to restore sanity to our economy

There's much more, of course, and you'll be hearing more detail about each of these issues in the weeks ahead.
**But let's be clear about one thing. While you and I and most people in America see these proposals as common sense, they represent a very real threat to the political and financial establishments. **
We are challenging powerful special interests, which is exactly what we have to do if we are to transform our society.
For years, the very rich have gotten richer while the rest of us have gotten poorer. Powerful corporations make billions emitting carbon into the atmosphere as they accelerate climate change and help destroy the planet. Private insurance companies and drug companies make huge profits while 35 million Americans have no health insurance.
**Now, a handful of billionaires are flooding our political system with huge amounts of money, drowning out the voices of the rest of America. They own much of the economy. Now they want to own our government.**
But we're not going to allow that to happen. The forces of greed are enormously powerful but, when we stand together, we can beat them. And we're going to beat them not just for ourselves, but for future generations and for the survival of our planet.
[**Now I am asking you, friend, to help us build our campaign. Please contribute $5 now to our campaign.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2171/43f17890/5e73a995/621dead3/4243135079/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/political-revolution?refcode=em150526pm1-b")
Let's be clear about something in this campaign: we will be vastly outspent, not just by other candidates, but also by Super PACs and shadowy groups funded by some of the wealthiest people in this country.
**I can promise you this, however. Every penny contributed to our campaign will go to building the platform on which we can launch our political revolution.**
Already, more than 120,000 people have contributed over $5 million dollars to our campaign, with an average contribution of about $40 dollars. In other words, our campaign is not being funded by million dollar checks coming from the rich and the powerful.
Instead, we are powered by ten dollars from a park ranger in Florida; twenty dollars from a woman who cleans school buses in Colorado; thirty-five dollars from a union worker in Minnesota. Incredibly, we are receiving five dollar contributions from low-income folks who are retired, on disability, or who are struggling to get a job in this economy.
And if you can't donate right now, I understand that. Times are tough for too many people, and there are other ways that you can help. **But if you're fortunate enough to be able to make a contribution to our campaign, it would be great if you could make a contribution right now.**
[**Click here to donate $5 to our campaign for president.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2171/43f17890/5e73a995/621dead3/4243135079/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/political-revolution?refcode=em150526pm1-b")
It's almost time to go out and meet the thousands of Vermonters who are in Burlington today to join our campaign kickoff. As we hit the campaign trail, you'll hear more from us in the days ahead as we take our grassroots movement to New Hampshire, Iowa and elsewhere.
I cannot thank you enough for all you've done so far for our campaign, and all you'll continue to do.
Thank you from the bottom of my heart.
\- Bernie
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2171/43f17890/5e73a995/621dead3/4243135079/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/political-revolution?refcode=em150526pm1-b")

P.S. You can watch a livestream of my announcement online. [**Click here to watch at 5pm ET**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2171/43f17890/5e73a995/621dead0/4243135079/VEsD/ "https://berniesanders.com/news/bernies-announcement/").

Paid for by Bernie 2016
(not the billionaires)
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2171/43f17890/5e73a995/621dead1/4243135079/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2171/43f17890/5e73a995/621deade/4243135079/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Jane Sanders
subject: What a day
body:
#
Friend,
My name is Jane Sanders, and Bernie and I have been married for 27 years. And I'll never forget what I just saw in Burlington.
Bernie rocked it -- thousands of people came out to support the official kickoff of our campaign. It was so inspiring to see so many people together to help start our political revolution.
You've heard a lot from Bernie today, but it's just so important to build our campaign -- and to build it well.
[**Can you chip in $5 to our campaign?**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2172/43f17890/5e672810/621de975/1105070535/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/political-revolution?refcode=em150526pm2-1")
We're off to New Hampshire tomorrow, where even more excitement awaits as Bernie meets with voters and supporters.
Thanks so much for your support of Bernie and our campaign. I can't wait to see what we can do together.
Best,
Jane Sanders
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2172/43f17890/5e672810/621de975/1105070535/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/political-revolution?refcode=em150526pm2-1")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
(not the billionaires)
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2172/43f17890/5e672810/621de972/1105070535/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2172/43f17890/5e672810/621de973/1105070535/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Josh Wolf, MurphyForFlorida.com
subject: URGENT: First attacks against Patrick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| The conservative Club for Growth is buying ads attacking Patrick.Friend -- **This just in: The ultra-right-wing super PAC Club for Growth just bought a $250,000 ad buy attacking Patrick.** Why are they attacking him? Because they know that he's the only Democrat who can win. The Club for Growth is targeting strong Democrats across the country -- they've even attacked Elizabeth Warren on the same issue. Patrick first entered politics to fight back against Tea Party obstructionists like the Club for Growth. He knows that their intent is to outsource Florida jobs overseas and to privatize Social Security and Medicare. Patrick won't let that happen -- but he needs your help today to fight back against these right-wing attacks. Will you stand with him? _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida.
